name: Methylfolate
summary: Adjunctive L-methylfolate improves depressive symptoms in some patients.
description: Methylfolate (L-5-MTHF) is an active folate form used as a mood adjunct in some populations, consistent with one-carbon metabolism and neurotransmitter support.
safetyNotes: Safety notes are not source-complete in this workbook row; avoid broad safety claims and hold for interaction, population, and formulation review.
